content:
# Reef Bearing Carbonate Ramp

**Summary**: A carbonate ramp that includes reefal growth in the inner-ramp zone.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-bashri|Bashri, 2022]] identified a reef-bearing-carbonate-ramp model for Phase 2 of the Hanifa Formation.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-bashri|Bashri, 2022]] Reflects a transition from a simple ramp to one with localized reef development.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-bashri|Bashri, 2022]] Based on the presence of coral and stromatoporoid biostromes.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The study supports the finding that the carbonate homoclinal ramp depositional model can be used... with the development of large patch reefs in the second phase. ([[2022-bashri|Bashri, 2022, p. 58]])
